calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator); Ross Madden (Counsel for Michael Toropovsky, Petitioner).

Mr. Ferdon advised that Court that while the matter would be one in which the Public Administrator (hereinafter "PA") had priorty in administration, he also noted that in light of the particular facts of this case, the PA's participation might delay the administration of this case and the related cases. That said, the Court granted the Petition appointing Michael Toropovsky as the Personal Representative of the Estate of Valentine Yarinsky and set bond at $350,000.00 (signing the Order for same in open court).

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Continued To Mar-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden (Counsel for Michael Toropovsky, Petitioner); Jonathan Ferdon (Counsel for the San Francisco Public Administrator).

The Court noted at the outset its concern that notice of the Petition had not been given to the San Francisco Public Administrator since ostensibly, the Public Administrator had priority to administer the estate of the decedent over the Petitioner. The matter was continued to March 19, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. Madden sufficient time to provide notice to the Public Administrator. The Public Administrator will file a declaration of its intentions (to administer or not) prior to that date.

Judicial Officer: Dorothy McMath, Judge Pro Tempore; Reporter: Katie Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: Jimmy Peralta; Court Examiner: None; Court Clerk: R. Michael Diles.
